metadata.rationale: The article mixes real social-media reactions around #UFC328 with a misleading ratings narrative built from an edited screenshot. Its main problem is that unverified AI-chat material is reframed as credible overnight audience evidence and visually packaged to look like legitimate broadcast-ratings reporting.

prediction.predicted_label: verdict=Mostly False | taxonomy=T1 Fabrication; C1 Semantic Inconsistency; C2 Contextual Inconsistency
